browser.notes: Arc for daily browsing; Chrome for Playwright/CDP, DevTools, and visual QA capture when Arc cannot attach.

elevatedCommands.humanTerminalHint: Open Terminal.app (not Cursor) for elevated macOS steps — e.g. iOS Simulator runtime DMG registration.

terminal.notes: Agents run pnpm/node/git/gh/baseline in Cursor; Class S elevated steps use macOS Terminal.
